docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VISTO, MARIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GREG ANDERSON FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GREG ANDERSON FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED OCT-23-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. GREG ANDERSON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2024 - CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. AND PLAINTIFF MARIE VISTO TO EXCHANGE EXHIBITS TO FEB-26-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MARIE VISTO APPEARED IN COURT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. APPEARED VIA ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VISTO, MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. DEFENDANT AIRBNB SHALL REINSTATE THE VOUCHER IN THE AMOUNT OF $1660 TO BE USABLE FOR NO LESS THAN 2 YEARS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,328.42 FILED BY VISTO, MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF MARIE VISTTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY VISTO, MARIE AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUE CASE ON FEBRUARY 26, 2025 @ 1:30 PM FOR DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. TO SEND OUT ITS EXHIBITS TO PLAINTIFF MARIE VISTO
